title: Hiring Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services!
